title: SpaceX IPO — Boon Or Boondoggle?
description:
SpaceX plans to go public next month. Will new investors see substantial gains or covering Elon's losses from his misadventures? 
The post SpaceX IPO — Boon Or Boondoggle? appeared first on CleanTechnica.

title: SpaceX wins $2.29B to speed Space Force’s LEO communications ‘backbone’
description: The SpaceX “backbone” constellation will support the broader Space Data Network, which will include the Space Development Agency’s Transport layer satellites.

description: SpaceX's recent IPO and Starship rocket test flight delivered two big data points that offer a realistic vision for the coming years — and one that may disappoint both the company's boosters and its critics.

description: American Airlines said Tuesday it plans to install Starlink on more than 500 Airbus aircraft, the latest carrier win for IPO-bound SpaceX.

title: Humanoid partners with Bosch, Schaeffler to scale robot production
description:
Humanoid is working with Bosch to make and distribute its HMND robot in Europe after also partnering with Siemens and Schaeffler.

title: SpaceX S-1 reveals Tesla’s Terafab deal is far from done
description:
SpaceX filed its S-1 with the SEC today ahead of its blockbuster IPO, and buried in the 308-page document is a sobering reality check on the Tesla (TSLA) collaborations that Elon Musk has been hyping for months.

title: Einride L4 autonomous electric semi truck gets real – in Ohio
description:
After a successful pilot in Europe, Swedish AI logistics firm Einride is deploying its SAE Level 4 autonomous electric semi trucks in the US, connecting EASE Logistics warehouses in Marysville, Ohio as part of the DriveOhio Truck Automation Corridor Project.

title: When Refusal Doesn’t Matter: Operation Epic Fury and the Erosion of Host Nation Consent
description: When the U.S. military launched its war against Iran in Feb. 2026, it did not just dismantle Iranian military capabilities. It shattered the illusion that the United States would consult with its closest allies and that an ally’s refusal to grant base access can stop an American war in motion.
